name: Thanksgiving Turkey Feast
subject: holidays/thanksgiving
prompt: a proud plump turkey standing tall and facing forward, a wide fan of long tail feathers spread out behind it, a round body, a wattle under its beak, two skinny legs, and a cheerful smiling face

name: Cute Hand Turkey
subject: holidays/thanksgiving
prompt: a very simple cute hand-shaped turkey with the thumb as the head and the four fingers as big rounded tail feathers, two tiny feet, big happy eyes, and a small beak, drawn with thick chunky shapes for little kids

name: Thanksgiving Cornucopia
subject: holidays/thanksgiving
prompt: a woven horn-shaped cornucopia basket lying on its side, overflowing with pumpkins, gourds, apples, grapes, corn, and autumn leaves spilling out onto a table

name: Pumpkin Pie Slice
subject: holidays/thanksgiving
prompt: a single slice of pumpkin pie on a small plate, a fluted crust edge, a generous swirl of whipped cream on top, a fork resting beside the plate, and a couple of tiny steam curls rising up

name: Thanksgiving Feast Table
subject: holidays/thanksgiving
prompt: a festive dinner table loaded with a whole roast turkey on a platter in the center, surrounded by a bowl of mashed potatoes, a pie, corn, a basket of bread, and lit candles, viewed from the front

name: Friendly Pilgrim Boy
subject: holidays/thanksgiving
prompt: a smiling Pilgrim boy standing and waving, wearing a tall buckled hat, a collared coat, and buckled shoes, holding a small basket of harvest vegetables in one hand

name: Mayflower Ship
subject: holidays/thanksgiving
prompt: an old wooden sailing ship like the Mayflower floating on gentle ocean waves, three tall masts with billowing square sails, rigging ropes, a few seagulls in the sky, and a hint of clouds

name: Give Thanks Banner
subject: holidays/thanksgiving
prompt: a decorative banner with bubble lettering that reads GIVE THANKS, framed by autumn leaves, acorns, a small pumpkin, and a couple of curling vines around the words

name: Autumn Harvest Pumpkins
subject: holidays/thanksgiving
prompt: a cheerful group of three pumpkins of different sizes clustered together with curling stems and a few autumn leaves and acorns scattered around their base, sitting on the ground

name: Thanksgiving Corn
subject: holidays/thanksgiving
prompt: a close-up of three ears of Indian corn tied together at the top, each ear showing rows of plump kernels, with peeled-back husk leaves fanning out behind them

name: Grateful Turkey Sign
subject: holidays/thanksgiving
prompt: a cute round cartoon turkey sitting down and holding up a small blank sign with both wings, a fan of feathers behind it, big happy eyes, leaving room to color and write a thankful message

name: Thanksgiving Maze Activity
subject: holidays/thanksgiving
prompt: a simple printable maze shaped inside a square, with a hungry turkey at the start in one corner and a big slice of pie at the finish in the opposite corner, winding paths between them and small leaves decorating the border
